title: HyperMix: open detection of engineered biosignatures in remote hyperspectral imagery
description: An open-source toolkit that detects a faint engineered reporter against complex natural backgrounds in noisy remote hyperspectral imagery, with calibrated uncertainty. Includes a physics-based scene simulator, an implanted-target benchmark on real airborne data (Indian Pines, Salinas, Pavia University), classical baselines (matched filter, ACE, SAM), and a physics-informed learned detector that generalizes from simulation to real backgrounds. Developed under the Experiment Foundation Hyperspectral Biology grant.
